description: Domain vocabulary for the Dopex/Stryke Concentrated Liquidity AMM Options protocol on Arbitrum and EVM chains

terms.label: Concentrated Liquidity AMM Options
terms.definition: Options market structure built on top of Uniswap v3-style concentrated liquidity AMMs, allowing LPs to provide capital within specific price tick ranges that serve as option strike prices

terms.label: Single Staking Option Vault
terms.definition: Legacy Dopex mechanism where LPs lock collateral for monthly epochs and sell call or put options at defined strike prices, earning premiums plus base DeFi yield

terms.label: Option Market
terms.definition: A smart contract pair defining the call and put tokens, associated liquidity pools, and pricing logic for a specific asset pair (e.g., ETH-USDC)

terms.label: Strikes Chain
terms.definition: The full options chain for a market showing all available strike prices, their liquidity depth, utilization, and APR for liquidity providers

terms.label: Strike Price
terms.definition: The price at which an option can be exercised, derived from the tick range boundaries of a Uniswap v3 concentrated liquidity position

terms.label: Handler
terms.definition: A smart contract that interfaces with a specific DEX or liquidity pool to source and manage options liquidity; identifies the DEX and liquidity pool providing collateral

terms.label: Hook
terms.definition: A contract defining constraints on liquidity use, including maximum duration (TTL) for which liquidity can be utilized and expiration conditions

terms.label: Time To Live
terms.definition: The maximum allowable duration for which liquidity can be utilized as options collateral; a hook constraint parameter

terms.label: Option Premium
terms.definition: The price paid by an option buyer to acquire the right to buy (call) or sell (put) the underlying asset at the strike price; calculated using Black-Scholes with on-chain implied volatility

terms.label: Escrowed SYK
terms.definition: The escrowed/staked form of the SYK governance token; xSYK replaced the legacy DPX/rDPX dual-token model following Dopex's evolution into the Stryke protocol

terms.label: Stryke Token
terms.definition: The governance token of the Stryke protocol, successor to the DPX token; xSYK is earned by staking SYK

terms.label: Dopex Governance Token
terms.definition: Legacy governance and fee accrual token of the Dopex protocol; superseded by SYK following the Stryke rebrand

terms.label: Dopex Rebate Token
terms.definition: Legacy rebate token of the Dopex protocol used to compensate option writers for losses; superseded by the SYK/xSYK model

terms.label: Vest Position
terms.definition: An xSYK vesting position representing escrowed SYK tokens that unlock over a specified duration period

terms.label: Chain ID
terms.definition: EVM-standard numeric network identifier (e.g., 42161 for Arbitrum One, 5000 for Mantle) used to specify which blockchain to query

terms.label: Call Token
terms.definition: The collateral token used for call options in a CLAMM market (typically the base asset, e.g., WETH)

terms.label: Put Token
terms.definition: The collateral token used for put options in a CLAMM market (typically the quote/stablecoin asset, e.g., USDC)

terms.label: Open Interest
terms.definition: The total notional value of all outstanding (not yet exercised or expired) options positions in a market, expressed in USD

terms.label: Prime Pool
terms.definition: The primary Uniswap v3 concentrated liquidity pool that serves as the underlying price source and liquidity venue for a CLAMM option market

terms.label: Swapper ID
terms.definition: Identifier for the swap routing contract used when exercising an in-the-money option; currently supports '1inch' and 'uni-v3'

terms.label: Option ID
terms.definition: The ERC721 NFT token ID representing a specific options position; used when exercising a position

terms.label: Liquidity Utilization
terms.definition: The ratio of reserved/sold options to total available liquidity at a given strike price; indicates how much of the LP capital is currently backing active options

terms.label: Annual Percentage Rate
terms.definition: Annualized yield rate earned by liquidity providers at a specific strike price from option premium income
